summary: Iteration 10 - High-fidelity design restoration testing COMPLETE. All 15 features verified. CTAs: 'Start a Project' (premium/blue solid) + 'Explore the ACE Engine' (ghost-gradient). InsightsSection with horizontal scroll cards on homepage.
